items.title: Berkshire Hathaway Warns of 'Adverse Consequences on Most, If Not All, Operating Businesses' as Q2 Results Reflect Mounting Global Pressures
items.description: Berkshire's Q2 stumble underscores the challenges ahead as Buffett's succession nears amid market turbulence and shifting global dynamics.

items.title: Is American Express Company (AXP) a Reliable Income Stock for Long-Term Investors?
items.description: American Express Company (NYSE:AXP) is included among the 11 Best Income Stocks to Buy According to Hedge Funds. American Express Company (NYSE:AXP) sets itself apart from other credit card companies by focusing on a wealthier customer base, offering premium gold and platinum cards, and serving a large number of corporate clients.
